commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Control UI/WebChat per-session message cache, alias-aware cache keys, final-event caching for switched-away sessions, reset cleanup, regression tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main clears `chatMessages` during session switching and returns early for final events targeting non-selected sessions. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
